data.Audit Results Summary: No internal audits yet - first audit scheduled March 31 2026.
data.Complaint Summary: Pre-market wellness version: ~1-2 contact messages/day, no safety-related complaints, no adverse events reported.
data.CAPA Status Summary: No open CAPAs. QMS newly established.
data.PMS Findings Summary: Pre-market baseline established from wellness version. No safety signals. Known issue: occasional AI role confusion (monitored via FLAG_SWITCHED_ROLES).
data.Process Performance Summary: QMS platform operational. All 44 documents created and approved. Document control process functional.
data.Regulatory Changes Summary: NB (Scarlet) engagement scheduled April 7 2026. Internal audit March 31 2026. EU MDR requirements mapped to QMS documents.
data.Improvement Actions: 1. Complete Hetzner DPA (DONE March 25). 2. Prepare for internal audit March 31. 3. Create auditor account for Scarlet. 4. Implement data retention automation (180-day purge). 5. Add FLAG_CRISIS monitoring. 6. Enable crisis protocol in conversation jobs.
data.Quality Objectives Review: Initial quality objectives established in POL-001. Baseline measurement period begins with medical device market entry.
